system.benefit: Enemies suffer -20 BS when shooting at you during Charge or Run
system.description: Light on his feet, the character dodges and weaves as he moves, skills learned from long years in the line of fire. When the character performs a Charge or Run Action, opponents suffer a –20 penalty to Ballistic Skill Tests made to hit the character with a ranged weapon. This penalty continues until the start of the character's next turn.
